name: Buy Shield using Diamonds
note: On the action that confirms the purchase, add "set_flag": "shield_purchased" so the shield task knows to go back to the warehouse and apply it. Use "abort_task_if_not_found" / ABORT_TASK-style back-outs freely — shield.json runs this with contain_abort.

actions.note: Verify we are in HQ view before starting

Step 9: find the shop card for the shield type selected in farm settings; if not visible, scroll down, wait 4s, and look again. The *_icon templates are cropped above the owned-count badge (which changes after every purchase); tap 113px below the icon centre so the tap lands on the diamond-price bar instead of the dead shield icon. Backs out of the task if not found after scrolling.

actions.log_skip: Not purchased — buy button not found
actions.note: Step 11: buy if possible; on success the popup closes by itself and the flag tells the shield task to apply the new shield
Step 11 fallback: not purchased — close the popup

actions.log_skip: btn_close gone — popup closed, moving on to the back button
actions.note: Not-purchased path: look for btn_close again and click it if still on screen

actions.log_skip: No back button found — could not back out of the store
actions.note: Exit the store — both purchase outcomes end here
